title: Add ScrollStop UGC Ad Studio to build
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [ScrollStop UGC Ad Studio](https://scrollstop-ugc-studio.vercel.app/) to build
- ScrollStop UGC Studio is a web app that helps creators and marketers generate short-form UGC ad ideas for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts. Users enter product details, target audience, offer, and creative a

Fixes #11448

gist.headline: Stop the scroll, gently
gist.blurb: ScrollStop UGC Ad Studio has joined the garden. Give it a product, audience, offer, and creative angle; it helps turn the blank-page stare into short-form ad ideas.
gist.summary: Added ScrollStop UGC Ad Studio to the community app build, giving creators and marketers a web tool for generating TikTok, Reels, and Shorts UGC ad ideas from product details, target audience, offers, and creative angles.
gist.impact: Users can now discover ScrollStop alongside other Pollinations-powered apps and use it to turn campaign inputs into practical short-form ad concepts.
gist.visual_concept: Depict a cozy creator desk where Polly helps arrange product notes, audience cards, and tiny storyboard panels for vertical short-form videos. A retro monitor shows a simple pixel-font "SCROLLSTOP" idea board, while code-plants and flowers grow around the workspace to represent ideas taking root.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush, light blue wings, and a tiny director's beret, helping create vertical UGC ad storyboard cards at a warm retro computer desk; the monitor displays simple pixel text: "SCROLLSTOP". Lime green (#ecf874) is prominent in the glowing screen and code-flower pots, with pastel lavender and peach gradients, cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, nostalgic but beautiful.
